Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Dismissal

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-21-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories; Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Batkhand Zoljargal In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Batkhand Zoljargal, Esq. (415.281.7104) of Law Offices of Melanie D. Johnson for Defendants.
No other appearances.

Parties' stipulation to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem previously on file.

Discussion held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS MARIA ROSALES and MILAGROS CERPAS' Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories; Request For Sanctions is Taken Under Submission.
